rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IBRAHIM MICHAEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/23/18 1. The Will provides for distribution to a Trust. Please amend to request distribution to the Trustee of such Trust, or give legal authority for distributing as requested in the Petition. 2. Please address whether each disclaimant is survived by issue. If so, and if distribution to Trust is not required, their disclaimed shares must go to their heirs.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DILLON T. WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioners are not represented by counsel. Court to determine whether proposed administrator, Gary Wong, will be able to competently administer the estate without assistance from counsel. 2) The sole intestate heir of the estate would have been Marina Wong, Decedent's mother, who is alleged to have recently suffered an aneurysm and is currently residing in a nursing home. It is unknown whether Decedent's mother is capable of objecting to this petition. 3) Proposed administrator's phone number was not provided in either the publication or notice of petition to administer estate. 4) Petitioner Gary Wong alleges that he just recently located Decedent's mother's "last known mailing address" and gave notice thereon. Petitioner to confirm that mail was properly received at the "last known mailing address".
